session.user:
Run ruff format on these two files that need reformatting: ruff format packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py
Then verify with: ruff check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py ruff format --check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py
Report results.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff format commands and verify the results. Let me execute these commands:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Verify formatting of two formatted files

session.assistant:
Perfect! Here are the results:
**Format Execution:** - `ruff format` successfully reformatted 2 files: - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py`
**Verification Results:** - `ruff check` on `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py`: All checks passed! - `ruff format --check` on the two formatted files: Both files already formatted (no additional changes needed)
All formatting operations completed successfully with no issues.
